Title: Botanical Garden Illustration Floral Sheet - Cottagecore Nature Print
Description:
Capture the delicate beauty of nature with this antique-style botanical illustration set. Featuring six classic flower arrangements—including Forget-Me-Nots, Dame Lilies, Sweet Petals, and more—this sheet is perfect for lovers of vintage, cottagecore, and natural decor.

Each detailed engraving showcases various floral specimens, presented in an elegant, scientific plate style. The sepia-toned wash on the aged paper evokes a sense of history and refined charm, making it a beautiful centerpiece for any room.

  • Perfect For: Gallery walls, academic displays, nursery decor, or incorporating into scrapbooking and journaling projects.
  • Design Feel: Vintage scientific illustration, botanical drawing, rustic farmhouse, and rococo aesthetics.
  • Gift Idea: Makes a unique and thoughtful gift for gardening enthusiasts, artists, students, or literature lovers.

Whether used as a standalone print or incorporated into a larger visual project, this collection adds an instant touch of timeless, natural elegance to your home decor.
